<?php namespace Laravel\Socialite\Exceptions; use InvalidArgumentException; class DriverMissingConfigurationException extends InvalidArgumentException { /** * Create a new exception for a missing configuration. * * @param string $provider * @param array<int, string> $keys * @return static */ public static function make($provider, $keys) { /** @phpstan-ignore new.static */ return new static('Missing required configuration keys ['.implode(', ', $keys)."] for [{$provider}] OAuth provider."); } }
